chapter_title.en: Chapter on the husband's Rights Over His Wife

text: 4522 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ يَنْبَغِي لِلْمَرْأَةِ أَنْ تُجَمِّرَ ثَوْبَهَا إِذَا خَرَجَتْ مِنْ بَيْتِهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4522 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"It is not appropriate for a woman to perfume her clothes with incense when she leaves her house."
